# artist - Diana Ross

## curiosities
**Comparable Fan Excitement** : The level of excitement and hysteria created by Shaun Cassidy at his concerts was compared to that generated by established stars like Diana Ross, as noted by Detroit security chief Al Wallace. "I have handled security on everything from presidential motorcades to Diana Ross and Tony Orlando The excitement the kid created was incredible." ← For the Record - The 70s > Ep. 30 - The Sweet Sound of 70s Bubblegum Music | https://seventies.libsyn.com/030-bubblegum
